patientsPage.title: Patients
patientTable.name: Name
sessionsTable.noSessions: No sessions recorded for this patient.
newSessionDialog.title: Create New Session
newSessionDialog.description: Select the activities you want to include in this therapy session.
patientOverview.noActiveActivities: No active home activities right now.
syncMetrics.title: Sync Metrics
syncMetrics.explanations.breathingSync: Percentage of exercise time where patient's breathing matched the target rhythm.
syncMetrics.explanations.tapSync: Patient's tapping accuracy relative to the game's guide rhythm.
syncMetrics.explanations.timeToSync: Time elapsed (in seconds) before the patient achieved synchronization.
syncMetrics.explanations.desyncEvents: Number of times the patient fell out of sync after initially achieving it.
syncMetricsInsights.breathingHigh: Excellent breathing synchronization indicates a strong calming response.
syncMetricsInsights.breathingLow: Breathing sync is low; consider incorporating more joint breathing exercises.
syncMetricsInsights.timeToSyncFast: Quick synchronization indicates strong initial connection and engagement.
syncMetricsInsights.timeToSyncSlow: Took longer than usual to sync. Monitor for potential distractions.
syncMetricsInsights.desyncHigh: Multiple desync events detected. The patient may be losing focus or struggling with the intensity.
syncMetricsInsights.overallGood: Overall session flow was stable and well-regulated.
sessionDetail.title: Session Detail
edi.noEvents: No EDI stepper events for this session.

progressPage.comparisonTitle: Routine vs. Flooding: Time to Sync
progressPage.noAudits: No home journal entries from the parent yet.

home.noActiveActivities: No active home activities right now.

livePage.title: Live Sessions
livePage.description: Real-time monitoring of sessions currently in progress
livePage.noActiveTitle: No live sessions active right now
livePage.noActiveDesc: Full real-time monitoring will work once a SignalR connection to the Unity child client is wired up. In the meantime you can launch a guided live-session simulation with one of your patients.
liveDetail.title: Live Session Monitor
liveDetail.comingSoonDesc: This screen simulates the in-clinic EDI and breathing-sync flow. Once the SignalR hub exists, this view will be fed in real time by the Unity child client instead of manual control.
liveDetail.factPlaceholder: e.g. My friend didn't text me back
liveDetail.stepperComplete: EDI cycle complete. The boat continues down the river.
settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Configure parent-shared guidance card visibility per patient
settingsPage.sharingDesc: Controls whether a patient's parent sees shared guidance cards from sessions. This is a placeholder — toggles are not yet functional.

activities.dialogDescription: Set a shared home-practice goal for the parent and child.
